blended.narrative: Willamette Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 48°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 16".
